title: How to do quests
description: Learn how quest mechanics work, including dialogue choices, real items, and safe processes.

dialogue.text: Beeep-bop! dChat online—your overcaffeinated quest sidekick. My purpose? Boost your journey and keep the hype levels optimal. dChat time! Ready for your first quest?

options.text: Wait, why are you in my garage?
A quest, you say? Tell me more.

dialogue.text: A delivery drone dropped me off after you clicked Buy Now. I live in your garage now, rent-free. I'm here to help you crush quests.

options.text: Ah, it's all coming back to me now...

dialogue.text: I'm low-maintenance and power-sip approved. I stay local—no internet snooping—and I thrive on garage vibes. Just keep me dry and away from heat sources.

options.text: Great! So, what's the deal with this quest you mentioned?

dialogue.text: Your quest, dear human, is to master the ancient art of... questing. Buttons, branches, and shiny rewards. It's easy, but the basics save time.

options.text: I got this, no need for a tutorial!
Alright, lay it on me, dChat.

dialogue.text: Ohhh, veteran mode! Say the word and we'll wrap this up. Take this smart plug anyway—and always unplug devices before adding a smart plug. Sidekick safety protocol!
All right, speedrunner. I'll be here polishing my antennae. High-five on your way out!
First mechanic: branching dialogue. Pick a choice, the adventure pivots. Different paths unlock different rewards and quests.
Some dialogue choices grant items instantly. Other choices only unlock when you already have the right gear. Here—free digital tokens. No money, no carbon, just shiny learning.

Bingo! Last mechanic: processes. A process can require items, consume items, create items, take time, and even cool down. For now, run the smart plug process and hand over the result. Safety note: make sure the wall outlet is dry and not overloaded before you plug it in.

options.text: Looks like I need this to finish the process.
Start the smart plug process to buy 1 kWh

dialogue.text: You're getting the hang of it! Soon you'll be a master quester. Need a refresher? Just holler—I'll be in the garage, ready for dChat time. Take some digital cash on me. Any questions before we wrap? Remember to disconnect the smart plug when you're done.

options.text: Nope, I'm good. Thanks for the help!
